items.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

items.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

items.title: US House votes to end government shutdown over immigration operations
items.summary: The vote provides funding for most Department of Homeland Security agencies, except for two subagencies responsible for immigration enforcement.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美官員證實　盧比歐和王毅在川普訪中前通話
items.summary: 美國總統川普預計5月中旬訪問北京，會晤中國國家主席習近平。中國官媒報導，中國外交部長王毅今天與美國國務卿盧比歐（Marco Rubio）通電話；一名美國官員以背景方式回應中央社記者提問時簡短...…

items.title: 倫敦反猶恐攻事件後　英國調升安全威脅警示
items.summary: 倫敦29日發生兩名猶太男性遭持刀攻擊事件，警方已定調此事件為恐怖攻擊，英國政府今天進一步對英國全境調升安全威脅警示，最新的恐攻警戒等級為「嚴峻」（severe），這是第2高、僅次於「危急」（...…

items.title: 美國土安全部經費法案通過　結束75天創紀錄停擺
items.summary: 美國國會今天通過國土安全部（DHS）大部分業務的經費，結束了一場創下紀錄、導致多個重要機構運作受阻逾2個月的政府局部停擺。  綜合法新社與國家廣播公司新聞網（NBC News）報導，繼聯邦參...…
